title.zh: 整理前端案例页与下载入口
title.en: Refined the showcase pages and download entries

summary.zh: 今天的主要工作是让智能体、工作流和产品页面更像一套可售卖的 Agent 展示站，而不是零散页面集合。
summary.en: Today's main task was to make the agent, workflow, and product pages feel like a sellable agent showcase instead of a loose collection of screens.

whatWeDid.zh: 补齐了智能体详情页里的配置说明、Scale 说明和 GitHub 下载入口。
whatWeDid.en: Added config notes, scale notes, and GitHub download links to the agent detail pages.

whatWeDid.zh: 把工作流详情页改成“流程图 + 输入输出演示 + 实现说明”的结构。
whatWeDid.en: Restructured the workflow detail page into a flow diagram, input/output demo, and implementation notes.

whatWeDid.zh: 为产品页增加挑战、解决方案、交付物和结果四个标准区块。
whatWeDid.en: Added four standard product sections: challenge, solution, deliverables, and outcomes.

difficulties.zh: 首页风格需要保持用户喜欢的简洁展示感，不能为了补结构把页面重新做得很拥挤。
difficulties.en: The homepage had to stay minimal and spacious, so we could not make it dense again while adding structure.

solutions.zh: 只在内页上增强信息架构，首页继续保留大标题、留白和清楚的 CTA。
solutions.en: We strengthened the information architecture on interior pages while keeping the homepage spacious with a clear hero and CTAs.

outputs.zh: 站点开始具备产品展示与 Agent 交付的双重属性。
outputs.en: The site started to function both as a product showcase and as an agent-delivery surface.
